_meta.purpose: BLOCK start of allergen-switch batch (regular→glutenfree or vice versa) UNLESS CIP cycle completed within last 60 min. Critical for HACCP compliance.

nodes.name: Webhook — Batch start request
nodes._comment: Called by PLC-MIX-B BEFORE batch start when allergen-mode change detected. Returns 200 = OK to start, 403 = blocked.

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "@type": "MessageCard", "summary": "HACCP guardrail — allergen-switch batch BLOCKED", "themeColor": "D32F2F", "sections": [ { "activityTitle": "🛑 Batch start BLOCKED — SOLVE-B guardrail", "facts": [ {"name":"Batch","value":"{{ $json.requested_batch_id }}"}, {"name":"Allergen switch","value":"{{ $json.current_allergen_mode }} → {{ $json.requested_allergen_mode }}"}, {"name":"CIP age","value":"{{ $json.cip_age_min }} min"}, {"name":"Vereiste actie","value":"Run CIP cycle voor batch herstart"} ] } ] }
